name: NEAR Bad Channels
description: Detect and remove bad channels using flatline, LOF, and periodogram criteria (NEAR pipeline)

inputs.name: isFlat
inputs.description: Detect flat channels in the data

inputs.name: flatWin
inputs.description: Maximum tolerated flatline duration in seconds

inputs.name: isLOF
inputs.description: Detect outlier channels using Local Outlier Factor (LOF) method

inputs.name: thresh_lof
inputs.description: LOF threshold to decide outlier channels

inputs.name: dist_metric
inputs.description: Distance metric used in LOF algorithm

inputs.name: isAdapt
inputs.description: Max % of channels that can be removed. LOF threshold adapts upward if exceeded. Leave empty to disable adaptive thresholding.

allowed_keys.isPeriodogram: Detect outlier channels using windowed periodogram analysis (true/false)
allowed_keys.frange: Frequency range for periodogram analysis [LowFreq HighFreq] (e.g. '[1 20]')
allowed_keys.winsize: Window length for periodogram analysis in seconds

inputs.name: isPlot
inputs.description: Plot LOF and periodogram energy trends for all channels

outputs.name: EEG
outputs.description: Output EEG structure with bad channels detected and removed

outputs.name: chLOF
outputs.description: Indices of outlier channels detected by LOF

outputs.name: chPeriodogram
outputs.description: Indices of outlier channels detected by periodogram analysis

help_text:
NEAR_getBadChannels() - detect and remove bad channels in the EEG data

Syntax:
  [signal, red_chFlat, red_ch, yellow_ch, LOF_vec] = NEAR_getBadChannels(EEG, Options, ...)

Inputs:
  EEG            - Band-pass filtered input EEG
  isFlat         - Set to 1 to detect flat channels in the data (Default: 1)
  flatWin        - Maximum tolerated flatline duration in seconds (Default: 5s)
  isLOF          - Set to 1 to detect outlier channels using LOF method (Default: 1)
  thresh_lof     - Threshold to decide outlier channels (Default: 2.5)
  dist_metric    - Distance metric used in LOF algorithm (Default: seuclidean)
  isAdapt        - Maximum % of channels that can be removed. If the current
                   thresh_lof removes more than this limit, thresh_lof value
                   will be incremented by 1 until LOF doesn't remove more
                   than the given % of channels.
  isPeriodogram  - Set to 1 to detect outlier channels using windowed
                   periodogram analysis (Default: 0)
  frange         - Range of frequency values for periodogram analysis in the
                   format [LowFreq HighFreq] in Hz (Default: [1 20] Hz)
  winsize        - Window length for periodogram analysis in s (Default: 1s)
  winov          - Window overlap factor for periodogram analysis (Default: 0.66)
  pthresh        - Threshold to decide outlier channels based on periodogram
                   analysis (Default: 4.5)
  isPlot         - Set to 1 to see LOF and periodogram energy trends (Default: 1)

Outputs:
  signal         - Output EEG struct with bad channels detected and removed
  red_chFlat     - List of flat line channels in the data (if any)
  red_ch         - List of outlier channels detected by LOF (if any)
  yellow_ch      - List of outlier channels detected by periodogram analysis (if any)
  LOF_vec        - LOF value for each channel
  thresh_lof_update - Final adapted LOF threshold

Author: Velu Prabhakar Kumaravel (FBK & CIMEC-UNITN, Trento, Italy)
